title: Notifications
pageDescription: Everything that happened while you were away — recurring posts, reminders and alerts.
emptyDescription: New activity — auto-posted recurring transactions, reminders and alerts — shows up here.

ended.title: Recurring ended
ended.body: {{ruleTitle}} reached its end date and has stopped.

overdue.title: Overdue
overdue.body: {{ruleTitle}} was due {{date}} ({{amount}}) and hasn't posted yet.

committed.title: Payment auto-added
committed.body: {{amount}} was captured and added to your transactions.

review.title: Review a captured payment
review.body: {{amount}} needs your confirmation before it's added.
